title: Enhanced Blast Furnace
description: Enhanced Blast Furnace aims to improve upon the vanilla implemented blast furnace.
body:
# Enhanced Blast Furnace

Enhanced Blast Furnace is a datapack that aims to improve upon the vanilla implemented blast furnace.    
    
It adds all smelting recipes that are normally only for the regular furnace.    
For example; cobblestone is now able to be molten to stone with the blast furnace.    
  

## Found a bug or something is not working correctly?  

Send me a message and I will fix it ASAP! :)    
  

## Why did you create this datapack?  

Personally I feel that the way the blast furnace is implemented by Mojang is mediocre at best.    
I smelt more cobblestone and other decorative blocks rather than ores. For ores I build farms, that way I have to mine less and can focus more on decorating and building.

## Interested in how this datapack is built up?

[Github](https://github.com/bdbekhof/EnhancedBlastFurnace)
